status_line: Sunday 7:39 PM UTC — SARAH Run 110 found Downloads clean. System steady heading into evening. Lands' End April 30 deadline is the live priority — 4 days out and still unactioned. GUARDIAN sits at 37 cycles dark, blocking both T2 final and Gallery client delivery. SCOUT's Smucker commit is staged locally but still needs a manual git push for the pipeline dashboard to go live.
